since_last: 15% of 86 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +0.66%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 15% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.37% · BTC -2.75% · Gold -1.19% · Nasdaq100 -0.19%. 15% of 86 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +0.66%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +0.66%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -6.52%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: MRVL is the standout at -9.36%
cards.body: Leaders: IBM +4.21%, SAP +3.50%, NOW +2.44%, WDAY +1.97%, INTU +1.83%. Laggards: MRVL -9.36%, MU -9.34%, ARM -8.03%, INTC -7.83%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -2.17% at $151.25
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -2.17% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
